scenario: Validate The system shall ensure a stable and responsive user interface, with a maximum of 2 seconds loading time for any session, and no more than 1 crash per 100 sessions.
steps: Perform the action described in requirement FR1

scenario: Validate The system shall provide clear and transparent subscription and payment practices, with no unexpected charges, and an easy refund process.

scenario: Validate The system shall offer a user-friendly interface that allows easy navigation and access to content, with clear categorization and search functionality.

scenario: Validate The system shall ensure the protection of user data, with clear and transparent data collection practices, and no sharing of personal data without explicit consent.

scenario: Validate The system shall provide an effective meditation experience, with high-quality content, and features that support user goals and well-being.

scenario: Validate The system shall be available on multiple platforms (iOS, Android, Web), with a consistent user experience across all platforms.
steps: Perform the action described in requirement NFR1

scenario: Validate The system shall provide offline access to content, with a minimum of 50% of content available for offline use.
